_comment: Merge the hooks block into your repo's .claude/settings.json. Copy adoption/hooks/board-check.sh into your repo and adjust the path below if you place it elsewhere (e.g. .claude/hooks/board-check.sh). $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is expanded by Claude Code to the project root. Set BOARD_URL / AGENT_BOARD_ID in your environment if the defaults don't fit.
